name: Rondonia (Brazil)

colors.symbolism: peace and the desire for harmony
Rondonia's mineral wealth, especially gold and cassiterite

description: Three horizontal bands of green, white and green with the central white band the widest, a yellow five-pointed star sits within a blue canton in the upper hoist.
history: Adopted on 31 December 1981 alongside the conversion of the Federal Territory of Rondonia into a state, by State Law No. 5; the design echoes the green-yellow-blue palette of the Brazilian national flag.

features.symbolism: Green-white-green horizontal bands with a yellow five-pointed star in the canton, the colours and symbolism shared with the Brazilian national palette
Blue canton bearing a single yellow star representing the state
